csharpCode: using UnityEngine; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { try { var lm = FL.Gameplay.Manager.LaunchManager.Instance; if (lm == null) return "LaunchManager null"; var fsm = lm.GameFsm; if (fsm == null) return "GameFsm null"; return "FSM current=" + fsm.CurrentState; } catch (System.Exception ex) { return "Error: " + ex.Message; } } }
